predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_descendants
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves descendants.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_adopted_children
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves adopted children.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_descendants_of_adopted_children
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves descendants of adopted children.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascendants
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves relatives in the ascending line.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_close_collateral_relatives
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_other_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves heirs other than descendants, adopted children, descendants of adopted children, ascendants, or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_no_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves no heirs.

predicates.name: property_belongs_to_estate
predicates.description: The property belongs to the estate of the deceased person.

predicates.name: property_is_deceased_share_in_community_property
predicates.description: The property is the deceased person's share in community property.

predicates.name: property_is_deceased_share_in_exclusive_undivided_spousal_property
predicates.description: The property is the deceased person's share in property held exclusively in undivided ownership between the spouses.

predicates.name: property_is_remaining_own_property
predicates.description: The property is remaining property of the deceased person's own estate.

predicates.name: property_subject_to_legal_return
predicates.description: The property is subject to the statutory right of legal return in relation to the deceased person.

predicates.name: donation_deed_or_will_provides_otherwise
predicates.description: A deed of donation or will provides otherwise for the property.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_descendant_group
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves descendants, adopted children, or descendants of adopted children.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascendant_or_close_collateral_group
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves ascendants or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_other_or_no_heirs_group
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves other heirs or no heirs.

predicates.name: obtains_usufruct_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse obtains usufruct of the entire estate of the deceased person.

predicates.name: obtains_full_ownership_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse obtains full ownership of the entire estate of the deceased person.

predicates.name: obtains_usufruct_of_property
predicates.description: The surviving spouse obtains usufruct of the property.

predicates.name: obtains_full_ownership_of_property
predicates.description: The surviving spouse obtains full ownership of the property.
